message:
feat(fwc): add auth, bench, and new subcommands for credential management, performance benchmarking, and connector scaffolding

auth: Implements add/list/show/remove/test/status subcommands for
managing locally stored connector credentials. Credentials are redacted
in all output, removal requires --yes confirmation, and structural
validation checks field presence and expiry without contacting live
services. Sensitive CLI arguments are now redacted from error payloads.
Also broadens OAuth2 auth-method detection to recognize standalone
access_token or refresh_token fields. Includes ~530 lines of tests.

bench: Adds a benchmark suite measuring RaptorQ encoding/decoding, CBOR
serialization, schema hashing, cryptographic operations, and cold-start
latency with statistical analysis. Emits machine-readable JSON reports
with environment metadata for regression tracking against canonical
performance targets.

new: Scaffolds FCP2-compliant connector crates with manifest, code
templates, limits.rs, compliance prechecks, and workspace integration.
Supports 10 connector archetypes (request-response, streaming,
bidirectional, polling, webhook, queue, file, database, cli, browser),
dry-run preview, and --check validation of existing connectors.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -23,6 +23,7 @@ fcp-core.workspace = true
 fcp-cbor.workspace = true
 fcp-crypto.workspace = true
 fcp-host.workspace = true
+fcp-raptorq.workspace = true
 fcp-manifest.workspace = true
 fcp-mesh.workspace = true
 fcp-sandbox.workspace = true
